variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 6167 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 6167 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 6167 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson X770818 Filter Kit | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 6167
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson X770818 Filter Kit is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
